Captions sourced as follows — (GB) 3.8M UK users from eToro's own statement (ffnews LSE partnership PR + businessofapps statistics); (DE) German is #2 language on eToro from businessofapps statistics citing eToro; (IT) CONSOB registration #2830, protocol 10033275 dated 2010-04-14; (ES) CNMV crypto-services register entry dated 2025-04-09; (FR) French is #3 language on eToro per businessofapps citing eToro (same source as Germany #2). combinedCapHeadline reuses the verified 40M/75-countries figure from the App Store press release (2026-04-14).

showcase.stages[8].data.series (Stage 9 chart) — RESOLVED 2026-04-20. Switched from quarterly revenue to FY2024 commission income by asset class (4 categories): Crypto 38% ($353.8M), Equities 38% ($353.8M), Commodities 20% ($186.2M), Currencies 4% ($37.2M). Total $931M. Source: eToro F-1 IPO prospectus (FY2024 reporting period), corroborated by Finance Magnates verbatim quote — 'eToro's 2024 Profits Soared 13x, with Crypto Contributing 38% of Commission Income' (financemagnates.com). Y-axis labels ['$400M','$300M','$200M','$100M','$0'] frame the max $353.8M cleanly with ~12% headroom.
sourceFiling date — Form 20-F for FY2025 was filed in March 2026 per SEC archive URL heuristics, but exact filed date could not be retrieved (SEC EDGAR browse returned 403). Cited as 'March 2026'.

Exchange market caps were researched but superseded by eToro user-base captions. If you ever want to revert: LSE $4.3T (Feb 2026 CEIC), Xetra $2.7T (companiesmarketcap 2026), Milan €1.042T → ~$1.1T (Wikipedia 2025), BME €1.597T → ~$1.7T (BME primary stats Feb 2026), Paris $8.4T (companiesmarketcap 2026 — includes cross-listed securities, was flagged as inflated).

data.title: eToro launches eToro App Store, its AI-enabled application ecosystem for trading and investing
data.fullText:
NEW YORK, April 14, 2026 — eToro announced the eToro App Store, a marketplace enabling investors and developers to build, share and access trading and analytics applications within the platform.

The App Store brings together developers, startups, Pro Investors and everyday investors to form the foundation of a new builders economy for investing, where financial innovation can be created, shared and scaled.

eToro introduced a builders portal providing structured access to eToro's APIs, agent skills, MCP server, CLI tooling, plus technical documentation. Partners can develop and distribute applications to millions of users globally.

Apps at launch include algorithmic trading with low-latency order placement, social analytics analyzing Pro Investor performance, market monitors streaming price data, portfolio tools with rule-based rebalancing, smart watchlists, and feeds and community integrations.

Users can also create tools using AI-powered, no-code capabilities to transform their expertise into scalable solutions.

"Investing has always evolved with technology, but AI is accelerating that in ways we couldn't have imagined a few years ago," said Yoni Assia, Co-Founder and CEO of eToro.

"The eToro App Store opens up financial innovation to anyone with an idea. Developers and quants finally have a direct line to millions of retail investors," Assia added.

eToro operates as a multi-asset investment platform serving 40 million registered users from 75 countries, founded in 2007.

The App Store rolls out to eligible markets with expanded functionality planned throughout 2026.

data.noveltyReason: New story — not covered in the last 7 days (92% unique)

data.description: Multi-asset investment platform offering equities, cryptoassets, commodities, and currencies alongside social-investing tools such as CopyTrader and Smart Portfolios. Serves 40 million registered users across 75 countries; headquartered in Bnei Brak, Israel.

data.reasoning: Financial data and corporate announcement detected (platform launch, user metrics) → Gerardo selected

script: Hi, I'm Gerardo. Nasdaq-listed eToro Group today launched the eToro App Store, an AI-enabled ecosystem for trading and investing. The marketplace lets developers and investors build, share, and access trading applications directly on the platform. It brings algorithmic trading, social analytics, portfolio tools, and smart watchlists to eToro's 40 million registered users across 75 countries. Chief Executive Yoni Assia said the platform could drive further growth as developers and quants gain direct access to retail investors. The potential upside from App Store adoption could reshape how retail investors discover and deploy trading strategies. Investors should consider whether this positions eToro for long-term success. The App Store rolls out to eligible markets throughout 2026. That's today's eToro snapshot.

script: Hi, I'm Gerardo.
Nasdaq-listed eToro Group today launched the eToro App Store, an AI-enabled ecosystem for trading and investing.
The marketplace lets developers and investors build, share, and access trading applications directly on the platform.
It brings algorithmic trading, social analytics, portfolio tools, and smart watchlists to eToro's 40 million registered users across 75 countries.
Chief Executive Yoni Assia said developers and quants now have a direct line to retail investors.
The App Store expands eToro's platform with AI-powered, no-code tool creation and a builders portal.
These features extend the offering to eligible markets with more capability planned throughout 2026.
That's today's eToro snapshot.
Hallo, ich bin Gerardo.
Das an der Nasdaq notierte Unternehmen eToro Group hat heute den eToro App Store gestartet, ein KI-gestütztes Ökosystem für Handel und Investment.
Der Marktplatz ermöglicht es Entwicklern und Anlegern, Handelsanwendungen direkt auf der Plattform zu erstellen, zu teilen und zu nutzen.
Er bringt algorithmischen Handel, soziale Analytik, Portfoliotools und Smart-Watchlists zu den 40 Millionen registrierten Nutzern in 75 Ländern.
CEO Yoni Assia erklärte, dass Entwickler und Quants nun einen direkten Draht zu Privatanlegern hätten.
Der App Store erweitert die eToro-Plattform um KI-gestützte No-Code-Werkzeuge und ein Builders-Portal.
Diese Funktionen werden im Laufe des Jahres 2026 schrittweise in geeignete Märkte ausgerollt.
Das war heute der eToro-Snapshot.
Ciao, sono Gerardo.
eToro Group, quotata al Nasdaq, ha lanciato oggi l'eToro App Store, un ecosistema con intelligenza artificiale per trading e investimenti.
Il marketplace consente a sviluppatori e investitori di creare, condividere e utilizzare applicazioni di trading direttamente sulla piattaforma.
Porta trading algoritmico, analisi sociali, strumenti di portafoglio e smart watchlist ai 40 milioni di utenti registrati in 75 paesi.
Il CEO Yoni Assia ha dichiarato che sviluppatori e quant hanno ora un canale diretto verso gli investitori retail.
L'App Store estende la piattaforma eToro con strumenti no-code basati su IA e un builders portal.
Queste funzionalità saranno distribuite nei mercati idonei nel corso del 2026.
Questa è l'istantanea di oggi di eToro.
Hola, soy Gerardo.
eToro Group, cotizada en Nasdaq, ha lanzado hoy el eToro App Store, un ecosistema con inteligencia artificial para trading e inversión.
El marketplace permite a desarrolladores e inversores crear, compartir y utilizar aplicaciones de trading directamente en la plataforma.
Incorpora trading algorítmico, análisis sociales, herramientas de cartera y smart watchlists para los 40 millones de usuarios registrados en 75 países.
El CEO Yoni Assia afirmó que desarrolladores y quants cuentan ahora con una vía directa hacia los inversores minoristas.
El App Store amplía la plataforma de eToro con herramientas no-code basadas en IA y un builders portal.
Estas funciones se desplegarán en los mercados elegibles a lo largo de 2026.
Esta es la instantánea de eToro de hoy.
Bonjour, je suis Gerardo.
Coté au Nasdaq, eToro Group a lancé aujourd'hui l'eToro App Store, un écosystème d'IA dédié au trading et à l'investissement.
La marketplace permet aux développeurs et aux investisseurs de créer, partager et utiliser des applications de trading directement sur la plateforme.
Elle apporte le trading algorithmique, l'analyse sociale, les outils de portefeuille et les smart watchlists aux 40 millions d'utilisateurs inscrits dans 75 pays.
Le PDG Yoni Assia a déclaré que les développeurs et les quants disposent désormais d'un lien direct avec les investisseurs particuliers.
L'App Store enrichit la plateforme eToro d'outils no-code alimentés par l'IA et d'un builders portal.
Ces fonctionnalités seront déployées sur les marchés éligibles tout au long de 2026.
Voilà l'instantané eToro du jour.

The marketplace lets developers and investors build, share, and access trading applications directly on the platform. It brings algorithmic trading, social analytics, portfolio tools, and smart watchlists to eToro's 40 million registered users across 75 countries. Chief Executive Yoni Assia said developers and quants now have a direct line to retail investors. The App Store expands eToro's platform with AI-powered, no-code tool creation and a builders portal. These features extend the offering to eligible markets with more capability planned throughout 2026. That's today's eToro snapshot.
